title: feat(sre): real chaos engineering + live SLO console
body: Inject real latency/errors into the site's own edge endpoints; measure real p50/p95/availability; self-healing faults.

title: feat(dev): real CPython REPL via Pyodide (WASM)
body: Genuine CPython in the browser with codeop/displayhook REPL semantics; python3 -c, file, and interactive modes.

title: feat(dev): the site reads its own source; real changelog as git
body: `source` fetches the live, deployed assets; `git log` renders the real development history of HERMIT-OS.

title: feat(data): real edge SQL over Cloudflare D1
body: Read-only, SELECT-guarded query endpoint over a real D1 database of projects/experience/skills.

title: feat: HERMIT-OS — non-ergodic orbifold terminal résumé
body: xterm shell, raymarched 3D orbifold, virtual filesystem, AIWASS, kernel-mode editor, Cloudflare Pages + KV.
